Reads use Underdog's true Pick'em payout, not the displayed odds — a leg's effective per-pick odds = . Per side: vs Avg = probability gap vs the field-average book price · EV (devig) = +/- EV vs the all-books de-vig consensus · EV (ref) = +/- EV vs a reference you pick (sharp-book avg or a single book).
